session.user: Run `make lint ty` from /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Do not modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make lint ty` command from the specified directory and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint ty to check code style and type correctness

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 make: *** [Makefile:13: lint] Error 1
uv run ruff check E501 Line too long (101 > 100) --> tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_download_remote_session.py:116:101 | 114 | current_branches={tmp_path: "main"}, 115 | ref_file_contents={ 116 | ("origin/planned-pr-context/42", ".erk/session/test-session-123.jsonl"): session_content, | ^ 117 | }, 118 | ) |
E501 Line too long (104 > 100) --> tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_push_session.py:170:101 | 169 | # Verify force push 170 | assert any(pb.branch == "planned-pr-context/42" and pb.force for pb in fake_git.pushed_branches) | ^^^^ |
E501 Line too long (105 > 100) --> tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_push_session.py:237:101 | 235 | assert output["stage"] == "impl" 236 | 237 | # Verify branch was fetched from remote (indicated by creation from origin/planned-pr-context/42) | ^^^^^
... [16 lines omitted] ...
Found 4 errors.
session.assistant:
**ruff failed:** 4 issues found
All errors are **E501 (Line too long)** violations where lines exceed the 100-character limit:
1. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_download_remote_session.py:116:101** - Line 101 characters - Contains: `("origin/planned-pr-context/42", ".erk/session/test-session-123.jsonl"): session_content,`
2. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_push_session.py:170:101** - Line 104 characters - Contains: `assert any(pb.branch == "planned-pr-context/42" and pb.force for pb in fake_git.pushed_branches)`
3. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_push_session.py:237:101** - Line 105 characters - Contains: `# Verify branch was fetched from remote (indicated by creation from origin/planned-pr-context/42)`
4. **tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py:925:101** - Line 105 characters - Contains: `("origin/planned-pr-context/200", ".erk/sessions/impl-bbbb2222-part2.xml"): b"<xml>b2</xml>",`
The `make lint` command failed due to these ruff violations. The `ty` check was not reached due to the early failure.
